freshness_policy.living_claims: Verify against current primary or official sources before reporting tool, API, model, clinical, regulatory, or publication-archive claims.

adapters.name: preprint.arxiv
adapters.notes: Gather already has an arXiv command; expand toward OAI-PMH for bulk metadata if needed.

adapters.name: preprint.biorxiv
adapters.notes: Use bioRxiv API details endpoints, cursor pagination, and source receipts.

adapters.name: preprint.medrxiv
adapters.notes: Treat medical preprints as non-peer-reviewed evidence and route clinical claims through Crucible.

adapters.name: literature.pubmed
adapters.notes: Use NCBI E-utilities for PubMed, PMC, Gene, Nuccore, Protein, and related Entrez databases.

adapters.name: literature.europepmc
adapters.notes: Use Europe PMC Articles API for publications, full text links, and related metadata.

adapters.name: literature.openalex
adapters.notes: Use as a broad open catalog across scholarly works, authors, sources, institutions, and topics.

adapters.name: literature.crossref
adapters.notes: Use DOI metadata, funding, license, update, ORCID, and ROR fields as provenance evidence.

adapters.name: literature.semantic-scholar
adapters.notes: Use for citation graph, paper discovery, recommendations, and S2AG metadata.

adapters.name: trials.clinicaltrials
adapters.notes: Route trial evidence through status, phase, intervention, condition, outcome, and result receipts.

adapters.name: pid.datacite
adapters.notes: Use DataCite DOI metadata for datasets, software, and other research outputs.

adapters.name: pid.orcid
adapters.notes: Use public/member API boundaries and never treat identity claims as self-validating.

adapters.name: pid.ror
adapters.notes: Use ROR identifiers to normalize institutions and affiliations across literature graphs.

adapters.name: graph.openaire
adapters.notes: Use OpenAIRE Graph APIs for cross-object scholarly graph context.

adapters.name: structure.alphafold-db
adapters.notes: Use AlphaFold Protein Structure Database API for structure records and provenance receipts.

adapters.name: structure.alphafold3
adapters.notes: Treat AlphaFold 3/server/code outputs as model artifacts requiring version, license, input, and confidence provenance.

adapters.name: medical.midjourney-medical
adapters.notes: Monitor current claims and evidence; do not present diagnostic integration until clinical, regulatory, and API evidence is available.

adapters.name: preprint.chemrxiv
adapters.notes: ChemRxiv is a chemistry preprint source; verify current API terms before implementing a connector.

adapters.name: preprint.osf
adapters.notes: OSF Preprints aggregates community preprint servers; verify current API path before implementation.

adapters.name: preprint.ssrn
adapters.notes: SSRN spans several disciplines; prefer Crossref/OpenAlex metadata where public API access is unclear.

adapters.name: preprint.research-square
adapters.notes: Research Square provides API access by request; connector should reflect access conditions.

adapters.name: oa.unpaywall
adapters.notes: Use DOI-based OA lookup to find lawful full-text locations, license fields, and repository or publisher links. Requires source receipts and email/API identity where required by terms.

adapters.name: oa.core
adapters.notes: Use CORE for metadata and lawful full-text content from open access journals and repositories; record provider, document id, DOI/title query, and content hash.

adapters.name: oa.doaj
adapters.notes: Use DOAJ API, OAI-PMH, CSV, or data-dump metadata for open-access journal and article discovery; verify freshness tier before reporting currentness.

adapters.name: oa.pubmed-central
adapters.notes: Use PubMed Central and NCBI utilities for lawful biomedical full text and open-access subset discovery; separate article metadata from clinical claims.

legal_access_policy.blocked_reason: Research provenance must be lawful, reproducible, citeable, and safe to ship into enterprise workflows.
legal_access_policy.fallback_when_full_text_unavailable: Record metadata, abstract, license, access attempt, and mark full_text_status as UNVERIFIABLE.
